languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn waves his hand dismissively.{/n} "The kind of bickering about interpretation of ancient dogma that is bound to arise in any place where two Tech-Priests cross paths. A layperson who tries to fathom these arguments will gain nothing but a headache."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн пренебрежительно машет ладонью.{/n} "Всякие склоки о трактовке древних догм, которые непременно возникают в любом месте, где столкнутся хотя бы два техножреца. Погружаться в них будучи мирян{mf|ином|кой} — лишь наживать головную боль на пустом месте".

{n}Eogunn waves his hand dismissively.{/n} "The kind of bickering about interpretation of ancient dogma that is bound to arise in any place where two Tech-Priests cross paths. A layperson who tries to fathom these arguments will gain nothing but a headache."

{n}Eogunn waves his hand dismissively.{/n} "The kind of bickering about interpretation of ancient dogma that is bound to arise in any place where two Tech-Priests cross paths. A layperson who tries to fathom these arguments will gain nothing but a headache."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hace un gesto desdeñoso con la mano.{/n} «La clase de disputas sobre la interpretación de dogmas ancestrales que se produce cada vez que se cruzan los caminos de dos tecnosacerdotes. Los laicos solo pueden llevarse un dolor de cabeza si intentan comprender estas discusiones».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn waves his hand dismissively.{/n} "The kind of bickering about interpretation of ancient dogma that is bound to arise in any place where two Tech-Priests cross paths. A layperson who tries to fathom these arguments will gain nothing but a headache."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hace un gesto desdeñoso con la mano.{/n} «La clase de disputas sobre la interpretación de dogmas ancestrales que se produce cada vez que se cruzan los caminos de dos tecnosacerdotes. Los laicos solo pueden llevarse un dolor de cabeza si intentan comprender estas discusiones».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡不耐烦地摆了摆手。{/n}“就是那种如何解读古老教义的争论，只要两个技术神甫碰到一起就免不了。教外人士想要弄懂这些争论，只会头疼。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn waves his hand dismissively.{/n} "The kind of bickering about interpretation of ancient dogma that is bound to arise in any place where two Tech-Priests cross paths. A layperson who tries to fathom these arguments will gain nothing but a headache."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡不耐烦地摆了摆手。{/n}“就是那种如何解读古老教义的争论，只要两个技术神甫碰到一起就免不了。教外人士想要弄懂这些争论，只会头疼。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn fait un geste dédaigneux de la main.{/n} « Oh, des petites disputes sur l'interprétation des dogmes anciens, comme chaque fois que deux technoprêtres tombent l'un sur l'autre. Si un profane devait chercher à les comprendre, il n'en retirerait qu'une migraine. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn waves his hand dismissively.{/n} "The kind of bickering about interpretation of ancient dogma that is bound to arise in any place where two Tech-Priests cross paths. A layperson who tries to fathom these arguments will gain nothing but a headache."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn fait un geste dédaigneux de la main.{/n} « Oh, des petites disputes sur l'interprétation des dogmes anciens, comme chaque fois que deux technoprêtres tombent l'un sur l'autre. Si un profane devait chercher à les comprendre, il n'en retirerait qu'une migraine. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn winkt ab.{/n} "Das übliche Gezänk über die Interpretation überlieferter Dogmen, das immer aufkommt, wenn zwei Techpriester aufeinandertreffen. Ein Laie, der versucht, diese Argumente zu erfassen, bekommt bestenfalls Kopfschmerzen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn waves his hand dismissively.{/n} "The kind of bickering about interpretation of ancient dogma that is bound to arise in any place where two Tech-Priests cross paths. A layperson who tries to fathom these arguments will gain nothing but a headache."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn winkt ab.{/n} "Das übliche Gezänk über die Interpretation überlieferter Dogmen, das immer aufkommt, wenn zwei Techpriester aufeinandertreffen. Ein Laie, der versucht, diese Argumente zu erfassen, bekommt bestenfalls Kopfschmerzen."

languages.text: {n}エオグンは呆れたように手を振る。{/n}"古代の教義の解釈に関する口論は、2人の技術司祭が交わるどんな場所でも起こるに違いない。素人がこのような議論を理解しようとしても、頭痛の種になるだけだ"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn waves his hand dismissively.{/n} "The kind of bickering about interpretation of ancient dogma that is bound to arise in any place where two Tech-Priests cross paths. A layperson who tries to fathom these arguments will gain nothing but a headache."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, küçümsercesine elini sallıyor.{/n} "İki Tekno Rahip'in yollarının kesiştiği her yerde ortaya çıkması muhtemel olan, kadim dogmanın yorumlanmasıyla ilgili türden bir ağız dalaşı. Ruhban olmayan bir kimse, bu tartışmaları anlamaya çalıştığında baş ağrısından başka bir şey kazanamaz."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn waves his hand dismissively.{/n} "The kind of bickering about interpretation of ancient dogma that is bound to arise in any place where two Tech-Priests cross paths. A layperson who tries to fathom these arguments will gain nothing but a headache."

Ruhban olmayan bir kimse, bu tartışmaları anlamaya çalıştığında baş ağrısından başka bir şey kazanamaz."
